description: Peter has a long career managing and leading major projects and programmes including: major infrastructure programmes in Spain, Germany and France infrastructure delivery for the London 2012 Olympics the London Tideway Tunnel project, working with Government, OFWAT and Thames Water Jacobs Engineering’s portfolio of major programmes in the Middle East which including the Qatar 2022 World Cup Stadiums, Dubai Expo, Doha Metro and a new 650 kilometre freight railway for Etihad Rail that connects Saudi Arabia to the Indian Ocean. Peter now has a number of non-executive roles, including advising the Los Angeles 2028 Olympic Games client, chairing the new Havant Thicket Reservoir assurance board in the UK, advising the new hospital programme executive team and chair of the United Utilities enterprise board, an alliance of multiple organisations delivering the bulk of the AMP8 capital programme. Peter Shipley was appointed as a non-executive of Sellafield Ltd on 1 June 2025.

details.body:
Peter has a long career managing and leading major projects and programmes including:

  • major infrastructure programmes in Spain, Germany and France

  • infrastructure delivery for the London 2012 Olympics

  • the London Tideway Tunnel project, working with Government, OFWAT and Thames Water

  • Jacobs Engineering’s portfolio of major programmes in the Middle East which including the Qatar 2022 World Cup Stadiums, Dubai Expo, Doha Metro and a new 650 kilometre freight railway for Etihad Rail that connects Saudi Arabia to the Indian Ocean.

Peter now has a number of non-executive roles, including advising the Los Angeles 2028 Olympic Games client, chairing the new Havant Thicket Reservoir assurance board in the UK, advising the new hospital programme executive team and chair of the United Utilities enterprise board, an alliance of multiple organisations delivering the bulk of the AMP8 capital programme.

Peter Shipley was appointed as a non-executive of Sellafield Ltd on 1 June 2025.

Peter has a long career managing and leading major projects and programmes including:

  • major infrastructure programmes in Spain, Germany and France

  • infrastructure delivery for the London 2012 Olympics

  • the London Tideway Tunnel project, working with Government, OFWAT and Thames Water

  • Jacobs Engineering’s portfolio of major programmes in the Middle East which including the Qatar 2022 World Cup Stadiums, Dubai Expo, Doha Metro and a new 650 kilometre freight railway for Etihad Rail that connects Saudi Arabia to the Indian Ocean.

Peter now has a number of non-executive roles, including advising the Los Angeles 2028 Olympic Games client, chairing the new Havant Thicket Reservoir assurance board in the UK, advising the new hospital programme executive team and chair of the United Utilities enterprise board, an alliance of multiple organisations delivering the bulk of the AMP8 capital programme.

Peter Shipley was appointed as a non-executive of Sellafield Ltd on 1 June 2025.
Non-executive directors provide advice and bring an external perspective to business.

title: Peter Shipley
